headline: 3 Reasons CHRW is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: C.H. Robinson Worldwide has had an impressive run over the past six months as its shares have beaten the S&P 500 by 6.1%. The stock now trades at $205.75, marking a 17.5% gain. This run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.
